name: Spicy Cream Cheese Pastry
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, salt, and cayenne pepper and stir together.
2. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the butter and cream cheese to form a soft dough. Alternatively, combine the dry ingredients in a food processor. Add the butter and cream cheese and process with short pulses until the dough just sticks together.
3. Gather the dough into a ball, wrap in plastic wrap or waxed paper, and chill for at least 30 minutes or for up to several hours. Makes top crust for 1 large pot pie, or 3 individual ones.
